channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area high school football 2024: Week 8 preview, schedule
item.description: Top matchups in Week 7 include San Ramon Valley at De La Salle, Pittsburg at Heritage, St. Francis at St. Ignatius and others.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Prep roundup: Miramonte’s offense hums in win over Las Lomas, Menlo School flag football extends winning streak to 14
item.description: Prep roundup: Miramonte’s offense hums in win over Las Lomas, Menlo School flag football extends winning streak to 14
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Photos: Golden State Warriors host open practice for fans at San Francisco’s Chase Center
item.description: Fans got to interact with the Golden State Warriors during their open practice on Wednesday night at the Chase Center.
item.dc:creator: Jane Tyska, The Mercury News

item.title: Chiefs owner backs Harrison Butker's Republican PAC as Taylor Swift's presence divides fans politically
item.description: Chiefs owner Clark Hunt said he supports kicker Harrison Butker for creating a PAC with a Republican senator and is in favor of players using their platform for politics.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why Detroit Lions should make a big trade to replace Aidan Hutchinson
item.description: Let's face it: The Detroit Lions should probably make a big trade to replace Aidan Hutchinson with another star pass rusher.
item.dc:creator: Derick Hutchinson, Local 4

item.title: After Severino misplays a pair of comebackers, Mets in need of NLCS comeback against Dodgers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — On a night of misplayed comebackers, the New York Mets put themselves in a need of yet another comeback. Luis Severino twice botched grounders, leading to a pair of unearned runs in the second inning.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: At the midpoint of the season, Penn State in-line to host playoff game
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) At 6-0, Penn State moved up to no. 3 in this week's AP Top-25, their highest ranking since 2017. The Nittany Lions are in their second bye week and at the mid-point of their regular season Penn State would be seeded fifth in the College Football Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Giants' woes continue with loss of Andrew Thomas
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Things have taken a massive downturn for the Giants. The Giants are 2 and 4 and now they have lost their franchise tackle Andrew Thomas for the season after undergoing surgery for a Lisfranc injury on his left foot.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Super Bowl loss still stings for the 49ers headed into rematch against the Chiefs
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Eight months later, the pain of losing a second Super Bowl in five seasons to the Kansas City Chiefs has barely subsided for the San Francisco 49ers as they prepare for a rare regular-season rematch.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ravens' dynamic duo of Henry and Jackson help lead a rushing renaissance in the NFL
item.description: Inside the Numbers dives into NFL statistics, streaks and trends each week. For more Inside the Numbers, head here. ___ The running game has had a bit of a renaissance early this season thanks in part to a dynamic duo in Baltimore off to a historic start.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: For Johnny and Matthew: Blue Jackets play their home opener with Gaudreaus in mind
item.description: Johnny Gaudreau’s Columbus teammates were given a few options for how to handle their emotions during the Blue Jackets’ home opener. If you want to cry, cry. If you want to laugh, laugh. The only rules — play the game the way “Johnny Hockey” would and with him in mind.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jets acquire wide receiver Davante Adams from Raiders, sources say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) -- The New York Jets have agreed to terms to acquire disgruntled wide receiver Davante Adams from the Las Vegas Raiders, reuniting him with quarterback Aaron Rodgers, two people with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning donates tickets to first responders; offers discounted tickets for first 3 home games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning donated tickets to hundreds of first responders, other recovery workers, and their families following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Matt McCarty goes from Korn Ferry to the Masters after winning in Utah for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Matt McCarty started the year on the Korn Ferry Tour and now is headed to the Masters, winning his first PGA Tour title Sunday at the Black Desert Championship with a 4-under 67 and one swing that all but sealed it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: North Carolina football player dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: UNC had honored Tylee Craft, 23, during Saturday's game. Coach Mack Brown, however, said he hadn't learned of Craft's death until after the game.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Padres vs. Dodgers Game 5: Who will advance to the NLCS?
item.description: PHOTOS: The San Diego Padres and Los Angeles Dodgers will face off in Game 5 of the National League Division Series (NLDS) on Friday, Oct. 11 at Dodger Stadium. The winner of this game will advance to the NLCS, which starts on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5
